account.name: Mandala of the Three Jewels (Test Data)

roles.name: Dharma Architect
roles.description: Holder of the great view — designs the over-arching solution as one would map the path to liberation.

roles.name: Sangha Steward
roles.description: Marshals the assembly of practitioners, holds the timeline, and reports to the patron.

roles.name: Keeper of the Sutras
roles.description: Steward of the recorded teachings — fields, layouts, permission sets, and configuration scripture.

roles.name: Vajra Smith
roles.description: Forges the indestructible thunderbolt of Apex, LWC, and platform craft.

roles.name: Abbot of the Western Vihara
roles.description: Senior monastic — sets the standard of practice for all Salesforce craft and guides the senior bhikkhus.

roles.name: Senior Bhikkhu of Nalanda
roles.description: Long-ordained scholar of the great university — patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced wisdom.

roles.name: Novice Bhikkhu of Nalanda
roles.description: Junior monastic carrying discovery and configuration across the realm under the senior bhikkhu's eye.

roles.name: Bridge-Builder of the Six Realms
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond — samsara to nirvana, system to system.

roles.name: Senior Bridge-Walker
roles.description: Lays the stones of API, middleware, and event flows under the Bridge-Builder's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Bridge-Walker
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts, and the patient art of error handling.

roles.name: Healer of the Eightfold Path
roles.description: Tends the maladies in the build before they ripen into suffering — diagnoses defects with the physician's calm.

roles.name: Voice of the Dharma
roles.description: Lifts the great conch and the dharma drum — leads all marketing craft and the turning of the wheel.

roles.name: Senior Dharma Herald
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather the faithful and the curious alike.

roles.name: Dharma Crier
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the marketplace — content, creative, and the daily teaching.

roles.name: Scribe of the Tripitaka
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal patron and the architect's design.

roles.name: Master Vajra Smith of the West
roles.description: Senior forge-master — leads the most intricate Apex and platform engineering across the practice.

roles.name: Samanera of Nalanda
roles.description: The newly-ordained novice — learns the precepts of configuration under the elders' patient guidance.

_realmNotes: Four spheres of Buddhist cosmology, treated with respect. windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts in the past — past weeks get Time Entries, future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items with themed children.

realms.projectName: Sangha of Shakyamuni — Foundational Teaching Platform

realms.subAccountName: Assembly of Wrathful Protectors and Female Buddhas

bodhisattvas.themedRole: Master Vajra Smith of the West

dhyani-buddhas-five-tathagatas.themedRole: Master Vajra Smith of the West

wrathful-protectors-and-female-buddhas.themedRole: Master Vajra Smith of the West

historical-buddha-and-disciples.name: Great Renunciation
historical-buddha-and-disciples.description: Project kickoff: leaving the palace — discovery commences.

historical-buddha-and-disciples.name: Awakening Beneath the Bodhi Tree
historical-buddha-and-disciples.description: Build kickoff: the architecture is realised in a single night.

historical-buddha-and-disciples.name: First Turning of the Wheel
historical-buddha-and-disciples.description: Mid-project gate: the Four Noble Truths reviewed at Deer Park.

historical-buddha-and-disciples.name: Rains-Retreat Invoice
historical-buddha-and-disciples.description: Phase invoice trigger: vassa retreat completed, dana offered.

historical-buddha-and-disciples.name: Third Turning at Vulture Peak
historical-buddha-and-disciples.description: Go-Live: the Mahayana sutras delivered to assembled disciples.

historical-buddha-and-disciples.name: Parinirvana at Kushinagar
historical-buddha-and-disciples.description: Hyper-care close: the teaching transmission completes; the Sangha continues the work.

bodhisattvas.name: Generation of Bodhicitta
bodhisattvas.description: Project kickoff: the great vow is taken to liberate all beings.

bodhisattvas.name: Ride of the Eleven-Headed Avalokiteshvara
bodhisattvas.description: Build phase: compassion-engine deployed across the six realms.

bodhisattvas.name: Manjushri's Sword Sharpened
bodhisattvas.description: UAT gate: the sword of wisdom cuts through delusion in test.

bodhisattvas.name: Maitreya's Descent
bodhisattvas.description: Go-Live: the future Buddha activates the next-age platform.

bodhisattvas.name: Dedication of Merit
bodhisattvas.description: Hyper-care close: all merit dedicated to the welfare of beings.

bodhisattvas.name: Final Dana Offering
bodhisattvas.description: Final invoice: the patron's offering completes the cycle.

dhyani-buddhas-five-tathagatas.name: Mandala Consecration
dhyani-buddhas-five-tathagatas.description: Discovery: the five-family mandala drawn and blessed.

dhyani-buddhas-five-tathagatas.name: Forge the Five Wisdoms
dhyani-buddhas-five-tathagatas.description: Build: the five purified aggregates instantiated in production.

dhyani-buddhas-five-tathagatas.name: Vairocana's Audit
dhyani-buddhas-five-tathagatas.description: Solution review with the Primordial Buddha at the centre of the mandala.

dhyani-buddhas-five-tathagatas.name: Mandala Activation
dhyani-buddhas-five-tathagatas.description: Go-Live: all five Tathagatas seated, wisdoms operational.

dhyani-buddhas-five-tathagatas.name: Dissolution of the Mandala
dhyani-buddhas-five-tathagatas.description: Project close: sand mandala swept into the river — impermanence honoured.

dhyani-buddhas-five-tathagatas.name: Closing Empowerment Fee
dhyani-buddhas-five-tathagatas.description: Final invoice from the Diamond Realm.

wrathful-protectors-and-female-buddhas.name: Charnel-Ground Council
wrathful-protectors-and-female-buddhas.description: Kickoff council convened where obstacles cannot enter.

wrathful-protectors-and-female-buddhas.name: Subjugation of Inner Demons
wrathful-protectors-and-female-buddhas.description: Discovery: hindrances surfaced and bound by mantra.

wrathful-protectors-and-female-buddhas.name: Weave the Protector Threads
wrathful-protectors-and-female-buddhas.description: Build: protective wards woven through every workflow.

wrathful-protectors-and-female-buddhas.name: Tara's Swift Liberation Drill
wrathful-protectors-and-female-buddhas.description: UAT acceptance: rapid-response paths verified by Green Tara herself.

wrathful-protectors-and-female-buddhas.name: Vajrayogini's Inner Fire
wrathful-protectors-and-female-buddhas.description: Go-Live + handoff: the inner heat ignites the platform; protection complete.

wrathful-protectors-and-female-buddhas.name: Final Tsok Offering
wrathful-protectors-and-female-buddhas.description: Final invoice: the feast offering closes the engagement.

Siddhartha Gautama.notes: Rains-retreat (vassa) — annual three-month seclusion abbreviated to a working week.

Ananda.notes: Memorising the discourses heard at Savatthi — quiet recitation days.

Sariputta.notes: Visit to his mother in Nalaka village.

Mahakassapa.notes: Solitary forest dwelling — dhutanga ascetic practice.

Rahula.notes: Novice training week with the elders — extra precept study.

Avalokiteshvara.notes: Listening tour — attending to the cries of the world.

Manjushri.notes: Pilgrimage to Mount Wutai — annual study retreat.

Maitreya.notes: Tushita Heaven planning session — long-range roadmap.

Kshitigarbha.notes: Hell-realm outreach — vow-keeping field work, no remote access.

Amitabha.notes: Sukhavati Pure Land office hours — receiving aspirants.

Padmasambhava.notes: Hiding termas in the Himalayan crags — fieldwork, off-grid.

Tsongkhapa.notes: Ganden Monastery scriptural debate — annual logic festival.
